```{r}
# Perform KS tests
ks_FL_PA <- ks.test(FL_entropy, PA_entropy)  # FL vs. PA
ks_SSF_LSF <- ks.test(SSF_entropy, LSF_entropy)  # SSF vs. LSF

# Print results
cat("Kolmogorov-Smirnov Test Results:\n")
cat("FL vs. PA: D =", ks_FL_PA$statistic, ", p-value =", ks_FL_PA$p.value, "\n")
cat("SSF vs. LSF: D =", ks_SSF_LSF$statistic, ", p-value =", ks_SSF_LSF$p.value, "\n")

```
### gather
```{r}
figure <-  ggpubr::ggarrange(p_asvs,p_samples,p_ent, ncol = 3, nrow = 1,
                             align = "h",heights = c(1, 1, 1),hjust = -0.1)

figure<-annotate_figure(figure,
                top = text_grob("", color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(file=paste("output/plots/ALL/distribution_and_entropy.pdf",sep=''), figure,
       width = 15, height = 5, units = "in",dpi=1000)

figure
```

## GCA
```{r}
library(geigen)
library(pracma)
library(VGAM)
library(compositions)
```


### combine
We can only run with samples found in all datastes. 
A decision I am making is to make FL the master set, it was our first set and PA samples where processed based on FL.
Then SSF and LSF come from both FL and PA so wherever we dont have obs is not that we didn't sample its that there are no chloroplast reads so I am creating an absent topic.

- master sample list is the FL samples
- combine blocks, fill missing topics with 1 PER BLOCK

```{r}
combine_all <- function(){
  "wrap in a function so we don't mess up our main tables"
  
  # helper to prefix numeric topic columns -- 
  add_prefix <- function(df, prefix){
    df %>% rename_with(~ paste0(prefix, "_", .), where(is.numeric))
  }
  
  # FL
  FL <- W_FL %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_num") %>%
    add_prefix("FL")
  
  # SSF
  SSF <- W_SSF %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_num") %>%
    add_prefix("SSF")
  
  # PA ID lookup
  PA_ids <- PA_meta %>% select(Sample_num, ssf_id)
  
  # PA
  PA <- W_PA %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_num") %>%
    add_prefix("PA") %>%
    left_join(PA_ids, by = "Sample_num") %>%
    select(-Sample_num) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Sample_num = ssf_id)
  
  # LSF
  LSF <- W_LSF %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_num") %>%
    add_prefix("LSF") %>%
    left_join(PA_ids, by = "Sample_num") %>%
    select(-Sample_num) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Sample_num = ssf_id)
  
  # combine all
  all_wide <- FL %>%
    left_join(PA,  by = "Sample_num") %>%
    left_join(SSF, by = "Sample_num") %>%
    left_join(LSF, by = "Sample_num")
  
  return(all_wide)
}

all_wide <- combine_all()
all_wide

```


```{r}
add_missing_topic <- function(df, prefix) {
  # all columns that start with "PA_", "SSF_", "LSF_", etc.
  topic_cols <- grep(paste0("^", prefix, "_"), names(df), value = TRUE)
  
  # don't treat existing *_0 as part of the set (in case you call it twice)
  topic_cols <- setdiff(topic_cols, paste0(prefix, "_0"))
  
  new_col <- paste0(prefix, "_0")
  
  df %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      !!new_col := if_else(
        all(is.na(c_across(all_of(topic_cols)))),  # all topics NA for this block?
        1,                                         # yes → in "missing topic"
        0                                          # no  → not missing
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      across(all_of(topic_cols), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))
    )
}
```

```{r}
all_wide2 <- all_wide %>%
  add_missing_topic("PA") %>%
  add_missing_topic("SSF") %>%
  add_missing_topic("LSF")

#clean
all_wide2 <- all_wide2 %>% 
  filter(PA_0 !=1) %>% #this is the PA fraction not in FL - this will also drop samples from LSF
  select(-PA_0)
  

all_wide2
```

```{r}
print(sum(all_wide2$SSF_0)) #samples from FL without euks
print(sum(all_wide2$LSF_0)) #samples from FL+PA without euks
```

### prep blocks
```{r}
# Standardize environmental data (M)
M_FL_scaled <- FL_meta %>% 
  filter(Sample_num %in% all_wide2$Sample_num) %>% 
  select(all_of(keep)) %>%         ## keep is defined in FL prep_meta
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ .x + 1)) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), scale)) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) 
M_FL_scaled <- as.data.frame(M_FL_scaled)
M_FL_scaled
```
```{r}
FL_block  <- all_wide2 %>% select(starts_with("FL_"))  %>% as.matrix()
PA_block  <- all_wide2 %>% select(starts_with("PA_"))  %>% as.matrix()
SSF_block <- all_wide2 %>% select(starts_with("SSF_")) %>% as.matrix()
LSF_block <- all_wide2 %>% select(starts_with("LSF_")) %>% as.matrix()

add_rownames <- function(transformed, original){
  rownames(transformed) <- rownames(original)
  transformed
}

dataset_list <- list(
  FL  = add_rownames(ilr(FL_block),  FL_block),
  PA  = add_rownames(ilr(PA_block),  PA_block),
  SSF = add_rownames(ilr(SSF_block), SSF_block),
  LSF = add_rownames(ilr(LSF_block), LSF_block),
  Env = M_FL_scaled
)
```


### GCA function 
What are the major ecological axes that simultaneously structure prokaryotic (FL/PA) and eukaryotic (SSF/LSF) topics AND correlate with environmental gradients?
```{r}
#the goal is to prioritize variation shared across ALL blocks not just high noise within one block 

compute_gca <- function(dataset_list, nb_components = 2, scale = FALSE, lambda=10) {
  # Compute generalized canonical analysis
  # dataset_list: list of datasets to analyze
  # nb_components: number of components to compute
  
  ### Step 1: append all datasets
  dim_list <- unlist(lapply(dataset_list, ncol))
  
  if (scale) {
    ### Usually a bit better to scale the data
    dataset_list <- lapply(dataset_list, scale)
  }else{
    dataset_list <- lapply(dataset_list, as.matrix)
  }
  full_data <- bind_cols(dataset_list)
  #Sigma is the global covariance matrix across all variables in all blocks.
  Sigma  <- cov(full_data)
  #Sigma0 = covariance only within each block, NO cross-block covariance <- represents where blocks are independent 
  Sigma0 <- matrix(0, nrow = sum(dim_list), ncol = sum(dim_list))
  for (i in 1:length(dataset_list)){
    #### fill in the covariance matrix (block wise)
    a = ifelse(i==1, 1, sum(dim_list[1:(i-1)])+1)
    b = sum(dim_list[1:i])
    Sigma0[a:b, a:b] <- cov(dataset_list[[i]])
  }
  
  ### Step 2: compute the generalized eigenvalue problem
  sq_0 = pracma::sqrtm(Sigma0 + lambda * diag(rep(1, ncol(Sigma0))), kmax=100)  
  #goal is to make blocsk comparable to each other by minimizing their own variance 

  Sigma0_sqrt_inv <- sq_0$Binv
  
  #solve the eigne this is where cross-block covariance is high AND within-block covariance is low.
  res <- eigen(Sigma0_sqrt_inv  %*% Sigma  %*% Sigma0_sqrt_inv)
 
   ####  compute the canonical vectors
  A = Sigma0_sqrt_inv%*% res$vectors[,1:nb_components]
  results <- list()
  results[["canonical_vectors"]] <- list()

  for (i in seq_along(dataset_list)) {
    a <- ifelse(i == 1, 1, sum(dim_list[1:(i-1)]) + 1)
    b <- sum(dim_list[1:i])
    results[["canonical_vectors"]][[i]] <- A[a:b,]
  }
  
  # Initialize another list inside results
  results[["canonical_variates"]] <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(dataset_list)) {
    a <- ifelse(i == 1, 1, sum(dim_list[1:(i-1)]) + 1)
    b <- sum(dim_list[1:i])
    results[["canonical_variates"]][[i]] <- dataset_list[[i]] %*% A[a:b,]
  }
  
  results[['correlations']] = res$values
  results[['prop_variance_explained']]= res$values/sum(res$values)
  return(results)
}

```

```{r}
gca_out <- compute_gca(
  dataset_list,
  nb_components = 5,
  scale = TRUE,   # usually reasonable since these are probabilities
)
names(gca_out)
```

#### Loadings
```{r}
prop_df <- tibble(
  component = seq_along(gca_out$prop_variance_explained),
  prop = gca_out$prop_variance_explained
)

ggplot(prop_df, aes(x = factor(component), y = prop)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 0.1)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  labs(x = "Component", y = "Proportion of Shared Variance Explained",
       title = "GCA Scree Plot") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
groups <- c("FL", "PA", "SSF", "LSF", "Env")

variates_list <- lapply(seq_along(groups), function(i) {
  df <- as.data.frame(gca_out$canonical_variates[[i]])
  
  # give component names
  colnames(df) <- c("GCA1", "GCA2", "GCA3", "GCA4", "GCA5")
  
  # add block label
  df$Group <- groups[i]
  
  # create sample index (1–678)
  df$Sample_num <- seq_len(nrow(df))
  
  df
})

# combine all blocks
variates_df <- do.call(rbind, variates_list)

## add back sample names
M_FL_scaled$Sample_num <- seq_len(nrow(M_FL_scaled))
variates_df <- left_join(variates_df, M_FL_scaled, by = "Sample_num")
variates_df$Sample_num<-rownames(M_FL_scaled)
M_FL_scaled<-M_FL_scaled %>% select(-Sample_num)

#add cat meta
cat_meta<- FL_meta %>% select(Sample_num, YEAR, SEASON, lake,new_depths_mdh2,layer_name2 )
variates_df<- variates_df %>% left_join(cat_meta, by = "Sample_num")

head(variates_df)
```
```{r}
block_contrib <- variates_df %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    GCA1 = mean(abs(GCA1), na.rm = TRUE),
    GCA2 = mean(abs(GCA2), na.rm = TRUE),
    GCA3 = mean(abs(GCA3), na.rm = TRUE),
    GCA4 = mean(abs(GCA4), na.rm = TRUE),
    GCA5 = mean(abs(GCA5), na.rm = TRUE),
    n    = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

block_contrib

p_blocks<- block_contrib %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("GCA"),
    names_to = "Axis",
    values_to = "MeanAbsLoading"
  ) %>%
  filter(Axis %in% c("GCA1", "GCA2","GCA3","GCA4","GCA5")) %>%
  mutate(Group=factor(Group, levels=c("Env","FL","SSF","PA","LSF"))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Group, y = MeanAbsLoading, fill = Axis)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "GCA1" = "#0072B2",  # blue
    "GCA2" = "#E69F00",  # amber
    "GCA3" = "#009E73",  # teal-green
    "GCA4" = "#CC79A7",   # pink-purple
    "GCA5" = "darkred"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Mean |Canonical Variate|",
    title = expression(bold("A") * "")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))+
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.4, 0.92),        # x, y in 0-1 plot coordinates
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80"),
    legend.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 6)
  )

#ggsave("../output/plots/Multiple/GCA_block_contributions.png",p, width = 5, height = 4, units = "in", dpi = 600)

p_blocks
```

#### Canonical vectors  
```{r}
#Extract env canonical vectors (block 5)
env_vec <- as.data.frame(gca_out$canonical_vectors[[5]])

# Name the columns for the GCA components
colnames(env_vec) <- paste0("GCA", seq_len(ncol(env_vec)))

# Add variable names as a column
env_vec$variable <- colnames(M_FL_scaled)

# Reshape to long format for faceting
env_long <- env_vec %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("GCA"),
               names_to = "Component",
               values_to = "Loading")

env_12 <- env_long %>% 
  filter(Component %in% c("GCA1", "GCA2","GCA3","GCA4","GCA5")) %>%  #
  group_by(Component) %>%
  mutate(
    abs_loading = abs(Loading),
    highlight = abs_loading %in% sort(unique(abs_loading), decreasing = TRUE)[1:3]
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

## we need to do this becayse here light is not in logit transformation
meta_names<-read.csv("/Volumes/mlcoleman/project/greatlakes/Env_Metadata/meta_names.csv")
param_order2 <- sub("estimated_light_logit", "estimated_light_pcnt", param_order)
new_order2 <- meta_names$new[match(param_order2, meta_names$original)]

keep2=c("Alkalinity..Total.as.CaCO3_mg.l","Chlorophyll.a_ug.l",
       "Nitrogen..Total.Oxidized_mg.l","CTD_TEMP", "estimated_light_pcnt","Phosphorus..Total.as.P_ug.l",
      "Silica..Dissolved.as.Si_mg.l","Turbidity_NTU", "abs_depth_m", "STN_DEPTH_M", 
      "sbeox0Mg.L", "airT_14d_mean")

env_12B <- env_12 %>%
  filter(variable %in% keep2) %>% 
  left_join(meta_names, by = c("variable" = "original")) %>%
  mutate(variable = coalesce(new, variable))  %>% 
  mutate(variable= factor(variable, levels = new_order2))

p_loadings_env <- ggplot(env_12B, 
       aes(x = variable, y = Loading, 
           fill = highlight, color = highlight, linewidth = highlight)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = alpha("steelblue", 0.4), 
                               "TRUE"  = alpha("steelblue", 1.0))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = alpha("steelblue", 0.4), 
                                "TRUE"  = "steelblue4")) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.2, 
                                    "TRUE"  = 0.8)) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(Component ~., ncol = 5) +
  labs(
    title = expression(bold("B") * ""),
    x = "Environmental Variable",
    y = "Loading") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  guides(fill = "none", color = "none", linewidth = "none")

#ggsave("/output/plots/Multiple/GCA_env_loadingss.png",p, width = 4, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 600)

p_loadings_env
```

#### odinations -- fix light
```{r}
clean_variates<-subset(variates_df,Group != "Env")
clean_variates
```

```{r}
#the arrows
top_vars <- env_12 %>%
  dplyr::filter(highlight) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(variable)

env_arrows <- env_vec %>%
  dplyr::semi_join(top_vars, by = "variable") %>%
  dplyr::select(variable, GCA1, GCA2)

#some scaling
# rough scale based on spread of scores
range_x <- range(variates_df$GCA1, na.rm = TRUE)
range_y <- range(variates_df$GCA2, na.rm = TRUE)
arrow_scale <- 2 * max(diff(range_x), diff(range_y))   # tweak factor if needed

env_arrows_scaled <- env_arrows %>%
  mutate(
    xend = GCA1 * arrow_scale,
    yend = GCA2 * arrow_scale
  ) %>% left_join(meta_names, by = c("variable" = "original")) %>%
  mutate(variable = coalesce(new, variable)) 

env_arrows_scaled <- env_arrows_scaled %>%
  mutate(vec_length = sqrt(GCA1^2 + GCA2^2)) %>%
  filter(vec_length > quantile(vec_length, 0.2))  # keep above the X percentile

env_arrows_scaled 
```



```{r}
p_lake<- ggplot(clean_variates, aes(GCA1, GCA2, color = lake)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=lake_colors)+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8,size=3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.4,linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.4,linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(.~Group)+
  # environmental arrows (from origin)
  geom_segment(data = env_arrows_scaled, #subset(env_arrows_scaled, variable %in% params_wanted)
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = xend, yend = yend),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8,
               color = "black") +
  
  # labels for env vectors
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
  data = env_arrows_scaled,
  aes(x = xend , y = yend , label = variable),
  inherit.aes   = FALSE,
  color         = "white",
  fill      = "#2C2C2C",
  fontface  = "bold",
  alpha = 0.7,
  size          = 5,
  box.padding   = 0.5,
  point.padding = 0.3,
  segment.color = "black",
  segment.size  = 0.3,
  max.overlaps  = Inf,
  show.legend   = FALSE) +
  labs(color="Lake",title=expression(bold("B") * ""),
       x = "GCA1 (16.3%)",
  y = "GCA2 (12.0%)")

#ggsave("../output/plots/Multiple/GCA_lake.png", p, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 600)

p_lake
```
```{r}
p_strata<-ggplot(clean_variates, aes(GCA1, GCA2, color = new_depths_mdh2)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=depth2_colors)+
  #scale_shape_manual(values=lake_shapes)+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8,size=3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.4,linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.4,linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(.~Group)+
  # environmental arrows (from origin)
  geom_segment(data = env_arrows_scaled,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = xend, yend = yend),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8,
               color = "black") +
  
  # labels for env vectors
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
  data = env_arrows_scaled,
  aes(x = xend , y = yend , label = variable),
  inherit.aes   = FALSE,
  color         = "white",
  fill      = "#2C2C2C",
  fontface  = "bold",
  alpha = 0.7,
  size          = 5,
  box.padding   = 0.5,
  point.padding = 0.3,
  segment.color = "black",
  segment.size  = 0.3,
  max.overlaps  = Inf,
  show.legend   = FALSE) +
  labs(color="Water Layer",
       title=expression(bold("A") * ""),
       x = "GCA1 (16.3%)",y = "GCA2 (12.0%)")

#ggsave("../output/plots/Multiple/GCA_layer.png",p, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 600)

p_strata
```

### GCA summary figure

```{r}
gca_out1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_strata, p_lake,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1
)

ggsave("output/plots/ALL/gca_ord.pdf", gca_out1, width = 14, height = 8, units = "in",dpi=600)
gca_out1

gca_out2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_blocks, p_loadings_env,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 2
)

ggsave("output/plots/ALL/gca_summary.pdf", gca_out2, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in",dpi=600)
gca_out2
```


## Heart Plots
```{r}
#install.packages("ggnewscale") 
library(ggnewscale)
```

```{r}
main_stations=c("SU18","SU17M","SU15","SU06","SU08M","SU01M",
                "MI41M","MI27M","MI18M",
                "HU54M","HU45M","HU15M",
                "ER91M","ER78M","ER15M",
                "ON33M","ON41","ON55M")

# build the universal station_year levels from all metadata
all_station_year_df <- bind_rows(
  FL_meta  %>% select(STATION_ID, YEAR),
  PA_meta  %>% select(STATION_ID, YEAR),
  SSF_meta %>% select(STATION_ID, YEAR),
  LSF_meta %>% select(STATION_ID, YEAR)
) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(STATION_ID %in% main_stations) %>%
  mutate(YEAR = as.numeric(as.character(YEAR))) %>%  # <-- make sure it is numeric
  arrange(factor(STATION_ID, levels = main_stations), YEAR) %>%
  mutate(station_year = paste(STATION_ID, YEAR, sep = "_"))

all_station_year <- all_station_year_df %>% pull(station_year)
all_station_year
```

```{r}
get_heart2 <- function(plot_title, name, df, meta, 
                       value_num = 0.05, 
                       shared_x_df = all_station_year_df,
                       show_x = TRUE){
  
  layer <- unique(meta$new_depths_mdh2)[1]
  
  if (name == "FL"){
    list_colors <- FL_colors
  } else if (name == "PA"){
    list_colors <- PA_colors
  } else if (name == "SSF"){
    list_colors <- SSF_colors
  } else if (name == "LSF"){
    list_colors <- LSF_colors
  } else {
    return("check inputs")
  }
  
  # reshape
  df$Sample_num <- rownames(df) 
  df <- df %>% rename_with(~ paste0(name, "_", .), where(is.numeric))
  
  df_long <- df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with(name), names_to = "topic", values_to = "value")
  
  df_long <- df_long %>% 
    select(Sample_num, topic, value) %>% 
    filter((Sample_num %in% meta$Sample_num) & value > value_num) %>% 
    left_join(meta, "Sample_num") %>% 
    dplyr::select(STATION_ID, YEAR, topic, value) %>% 
    mutate(STATION_ID = factor(STATION_ID, levels = main_stations),
           YEAR = factor(YEAR, levels = 2012:2019),
           station_year = paste(STATION_ID, YEAR, sep = "_"),
           topic_num = as.numeric(gsub(".*_", "", topic)))
  
  # topic order
  topic_levels <- df_long %>%
    distinct(topic, topic_num) %>%
    arrange(topic_num) %>%
    pull(topic)
  
  # station_year order from shared_x_df
  ordered_station_year <- shared_x_df %>% pull(station_year)
  
  # station breaks from shared_x_df
  station_breaks <- shared_x_df %>%
    group_by(STATION_ID) %>%
    filter(YEAR == max(YEAR)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(x_pos = match(station_year, ordered_station_year) + 0.5)
  
  # apply factor levels
  df_long <- df_long %>%
    mutate(station_year = factor(station_year, levels = ordered_station_year),
           topic = factor(topic, levels = topic_levels))

  # lake color labels
  lake_labels <- df_long %>%
    distinct(station_year, STATION_ID) %>%
    mutate(lake_code = substr(as.character(STATION_ID), 1, 2),
           x = match(station_year, levels(df_long$station_year)))

  p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = station_year, y = topic, size = value, fill = topic)) +
    geom_vline(data = station_breaks, aes(xintercept = x_pos), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_tile(aes(height = value), col = "transparent") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.1, 5)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = list_colors) +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +  # <-- keep all shared x levels
    theme_bw() +
    labs(x = "", y = "Subcommunity", size = "Value", title = plot_title) +
    theme(
      plot.margin = if (show_x) margin(1, 5, 1, 5) else margin(1, 5, -5, 5),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold"), 
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = if (show_x) element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if (show_x) element_line() else element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right") +
    guides(fill = "none", size = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(data = lake_labels,
              aes(x = x, y = -0.5, fill = lake_code), 
              width = 1, height = 0.5,
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = lake_colors) +
    guides(fill = "none")
  
  return(p)
}
  
wanted<-subset(PA_meta, new_depths_mdh2 == "Strat_EPI" & SEASON == "Summer")
get_heart2("PA Prok Summer Strat_EPI (p>0.05)", "PA", W_PA, wanted, 
           value_num = 0.1, shared_x_df = all_station_year_df)
```
###strat EPI
```{r}
"only show subcommunities contributing more than twice their fair share, so value_num =2/k"

#FL
wanted <- subset(FL_meta,  new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_EPI","Iso_EPI") & SEASON == "Summer")
FL_epi  <- get_heart2("FL Prok",    "FL",  W_FL,  wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_FL), show_x = FALSE)

#PA
wanted <- subset(PA_meta,  new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_EPI","Iso_EPI") & SEASON == "Summer")
PA_epi  <- get_heart2("PA Prok",    "PA",  W_PA,  wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_PA), show_x = FALSE)

#SSF
wanted <- subset(SSF_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_EPI","Iso_EPI") & SEASON == "Summer")
SSF_epi <- get_heart2("SSF Chloro", "SSF", W_SSF, wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_SSF), show_x = FALSE)

#LSF
wanted <- subset(LSF_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_EPI","Iso_EPI") & SEASON == "Summer")
LSF_epi <- get_heart2("LSF Chloro", "LSF", W_LSF, wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_LSF), show_x = TRUE)


##save
figure <-  ggpubr::ggarrange(FL_epi, PA_epi, SSF_epi,LSF_epi, ncol = 1, nrow = 4,
                             align = "v",heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1.5),hjust = -0.1)

figure<-annotate_figure(figure,
                top = text_grob("Strat Epilimnion", color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14))

ggsave(file=paste("output/plots/ALL/strat_epi.png",sep=''), figure,
       width = 10, height = 12, units = "in",dpi=1000)

figure
```


### Cold water
```{r}
###cold
#FL
wanted <- subset(FL_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_HYP","Iso_Bot","Iso_Top","Iso_Mid","InvS_EPI","InvS_HYP"))
FL_cold  <- get_heart2("FL Prok",    "FL",  W_FL,  wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_FL),  show_x = FALSE)

#PA
wanted <- subset(PA_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_HYP","Iso_Bot","Iso_Top","Iso_Mid","InvS_EPI","InvS_HYP"))
PA_cold  <- get_heart2("PA Prok",    "PA",  W_PA,  wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_PA),  show_x = FALSE)

#SSF
wanted <- subset(SSF_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_HYP","Iso_Bot","Iso_Top","Iso_Mid","InvS_EPI","InvS_HYP"))
SSF_cold <- get_heart2("SSF Chloro", "SSF", W_SSF, wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_SSF), show_x = FALSE)

#LSF
wanted <- subset(LSF_meta, new_depths_mdh2 %in% c("Strat_HYP","Iso_Bot","Iso_Top","Iso_Mid","InvS_EPI","InvS_HYP"))
LSF_cold <- get_heart2("LSF Chloro", "LSF", W_LSF, wanted, value_num = 3/ncol(W_LSF), show_x = TRUE)

##save
figure <- plot_grid(FL_cold, PA_cold, SSF_cold, LSF_cold,
                    ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1.5))
figure <- ggpubr::annotate_figure(figure,
                top = ggpubr::text_grob("Cold Waters", color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14))
ggsave(file = "output/plots/ALL/cold_water.png", figure,
       width = 10, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 1000)
figure
```
